Massive Perplexity Update: Claude Code & GitHub CLI Integration

Perplexity Computer has integrated Claude Code and GitHub CLI, allowing you to build apps and fix bugs autonomously. Learn how this new sub-agent system handles end-to-end workflows from research to deployment without manual coding.

00:00 - Intro: Perplexity’s Massive Upgrade
00:27 - How Sub-Agents Build Projects
01:43 - Auto-Fixing Bugs with Claude Code
03:11 - What is Perplexity Computer?
04:03 - Claude Code & GitHub CLI Explained
06:41 - Perplexity vs Claude Code vs OpenClaw
07:58 - Recap: The Future of Autonomous Coding
09:27 - How to Stay Updated on AI News
